name: Favorite Cheesecake Squares
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: You can use any type of milk chocolate candies in place of the M&Ms.
~--------------------------------------------------------------------------
1. Beat margarine and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add flour and chopped walnuts, mix well.
3. Reserve half of the crumb mixture; press the remaining into the bottom of an 8-inch square pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 10 minutes.
5. Combine cream cheese, granulated sugar, and vanilla in a bowl. Mix until well blended.
6. Add egg, mix well.
7. Layer half a cup of candy over the crust.
8. Top with the cream cheese mixture.
9. Combine remaining candy with chopped walnuts and reserved crumb mixture; mix well.
10. Sprinkle the reserved crumb mixture over the cream cheese layer.
11. Bake at 350 degrees F. for another 20 minutes.
12. Cool, then cut into 16 equal squares.
